title: Slovakian Tofu Dumplings in French Béchamel Sauce
description: A unique fusion of Slovakian and French cuisine, this dish brings together the traditional dumplings of Slovakia in a rich and creamy Béchamel sauce.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Crumble the tofu into small pieces

instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the Slovakian dumplings according to the package instructions.
2. In a pan over medium heat, melt the butter and sauté the crumbled tofu until golden brown.
3. Add the tangy kefir to the pan and stir to combine with the tofu.
4. In a separate saucepan, make the savory Béchamel sauce by melting butter over low heat and whisking in flour to create a roux.
5. Slowly pour in milk, whisking constantly, until the sauce thickens.
6. Remove the cooked dumplings from the water and add them to the Béchamel sauce.
7. Stir in the cooked tofu and tangy kefir mixture.
8. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
9. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
10. Enjoy your delicious Slovakian Tofu Dumplings in French Béchamel Sauce!
